These companies offer a range of services for both residential and commercial properties, often backed by certifications and warranties.

Some of the top roofing companies in Eastern Pennsylvania include:

* **East Penn Roofing** is praised for its thoroughness, clear communication, competitive pricing, and efficient project completion. They are recognized for excellent cleanup and are certified as an Owens Corning Preferred Contractor, CertainTeed Shingle Select Contractor, and GAF Certified Installer, among other credentials. Customers frequently highlight their professionalism and dedication to quality work.

* **Clarke Roofing & Siding** stands out for its professional, punctual, and courteous crews, delivering quality work on roofs and gutters with meticulous cleanup. They hold 5.0 ratings on both Facebook and Google, emphasizing their commitment to a seamless and hassle-free customer experience. The company is GAF-certified and offers workmanship warranties.

* **Todd Miller Roofing** consistently receives high marks for its professional and hard-working crews, efficient job completion, and thorough cleanup. With over two decades of experience and an A+ Better Business Bureau (BBB) rating, they are known for reasonable pricing and excellent communication. They offer a "Lowest Price Guarantee" and free, no-obligation estimates.

* **Umbrella Roofing** serves the greater Philadelphia area and is highly rated for its reliability, competitive pricing, and effective communication. Customers commend their efficient project execution, thorough cleanup, and overall excellent customer service. They are GAF certified and noted as factory-certified installers of Duro-Last products. Forbes Home Improvement also lists them among the best roofers in Philadelphia, noting a 5.0 customer rating.

* **Bonner Master Roofing**, based in Media, PA, is recognized for its quick response, transparent communication, and high-quality roofing and exterior services. They maintain an A+ BBB rating and a 5-star ONE AllRatings score, reflecting strong customer satisfaction. They provide a range of roofing materials including shingle, polymer, metal, and slate.

* **Eastern Roofing Systems**, headquartered in Jessup, PA, is a prominent commercial roofing company that also offers residential services. Customers on Angi (formerly Angie's List) have praised their reliability, professionalism, and exceeding expectations with reasonable costs. They are a GAF-certified commercial roofing contractor and hold an A+ BBB rating.

* **Bell Roofing Company, LLC** provides comprehensive roofing and siding services across New Jersey and Pennsylvania, with over 30 years of experience. They are known for fast work, high-quality materials, and affordable rates, backing their work with a 10-year workmanship guarantee. However, some customer reviews on the BBB website mention issues with scheduling and communication.

When selecting a roofing company, it is advisable to consider their specific certifications, warranty offerings, and to review recent customer feedback for projects similar to your needs.

Based on the search results, here are the most prominent and highly recommended roofing companies serving Eastern Pennsylvania (including areas like Lehigh Valley, Lancaster, North East, and Northeastern PA). These are drawn from certified lists, reviews, and specialized directories. I've prioritized those with strong ratings, warranties, and regional focus.

#### 1. **East Penn Roofing** (Lehigh Valley, Allentown & Surrounding Areas)
- **Why recommended**: 5-star customer-rated for residential and commercial roof replacements, repairs, and inspections. Specializes in all roofing types.
- **Website**: [eastpennroofing.com](https://www.eastpennroofing.com)
- **Key strengths**: Local leader in Lehigh Valley; handles siding too.

#### 2. **Symmetry Construction** (Northeastern PA - NEPA)
- **Why recommended**: Reliable for residential shingle, rubber, and flat roofs on homes and commercial buildings.
- **Website**: [symmetrypa.com](https://symmetrypa.com)
- **Key strengths**: Experience in repairs and full renewals; emphasizes reliability.

#### 3. **Eastern Roofing Systems** (Northeast & Mid-Atlantic, including Eastern PA)
- **Why recommended**: Experts in complex commercial roofing with over 100 million sq ft installed. Offers inspections, maintenance, repairs, and extended warranties.
- **Website**: [easternroofingsystems.com](https://www.easternroofingsystems.com)
- **Key strengths**: Large-scale projects and preventive services for maximum roof life.

#### 4. **GAF-Certified Roofers** (Statewide, including Eastern PA)
- **Why recommended**: GAF (America's largest roofing manufacturer) lists top certified contractors across PA, with reviews and estimates available. Many in Eastern PA.
- **Directory**: [GAF Pennsylvania Roofers](https://www.gaf.com/en-us/roofing-contractors/residential/usa/pa)
- **Key strengths**: Backed by manufacturer warranties; ideal for repairs/replacements.

#### 5. **Lancaster-Area Specialists** (Lancaster County)
- **Why recommended**: Hand-picked list including Amish roofers like Indian Run Roofing (50-year warranties, fully insured).
- **Directory**: [Lancaster Roofing Contractors](https://lancasterpa.com/roofing-contractors/)
- **Key strengths**: Trusted local options for homes/businesses.

#### Additional Resources for Vetting
- **BBB Directory** (Lehigh Valley focus): Check ratings and reviews at [BBB Roofing Contractors](https://www.bbb.org/us/pa/lehigh-valley/category/roofing-contractors).
- **Angi Reviews** (North East, PA): 4.3+ average rating from 108+ verified reviews; 5 highly-rated local pros at [Angi North East Roofers](https://www.angi.com/companylist/us/pa/north-east/roofing.htm).

**Tips**: Verify licenses, insurance, and recent reviews on BBB or Angi. Get multiple quotes, especially from GAF-certified pros for warranties. * **Stormtrooper Roofing** is frequently mentioned with numerous five-star reviews and holds GAF Master Elite certification. They are known for residential roof replacements, storm damage restoration, and offer a 50-year material warranty and a 15-year craftsmanship guarantee.

They specialize in various roofing types, including shingle, slate, metal, and flat roofs, with a team boasting over 100 years of combined experience.
* **ROOFX Roofing** has an Allentown office with a 5.0-star rating based on numerous Google reviews and has recently achieved GAF Master Elite status, placing them among the top 2% of roofing contractors in North America. They offer residential and commercial roof replacement and repair, with a specialization in metal roofing.
* **3 Days Later Roofing + Renovations** has quickly earned a reputation for fast, high-quality work, typically completing residential roofing projects within days. They hold GAF Certified contractor status and have a perfect 5.0-star rating across Google reviews.
* **Mast Roofing and Construction** has been providing comprehensive roofing services in Allentown for over 20 years, handling everything from small repairs to full roof replacements for both residential and commercial properties.

* **J.O.N. Construction Inc.** is a family-owned business with over three decades of experience, providing roofing installation, replacement, and storm damage repair. They are a GAF Master Elite contractor and an IKO Shield Pro Plus contractor.
* **Whitaker Roofing & Siding** stands out with over 56 years of experience and holds both GAF Master Elite and CertainTeed 5-Star certifications, a rare dual distinction. They are a veteran-owned business known for a disciplined and detail-oriented approach.

# Best Roofing Contractors in Allentown, PA

Based on the search results, here are the top-recommended roofing contractors in Allentown:

## Top Recommendations

**1. Paul Wright Roofing**
- Family-owned business with 35+ years of experience
- Specializes in roofing, siding, and gutter services
- Known for treating properties with care and respect
- Serves Allentown and the Greater Lehigh Valley area

**2. Whitaker Roofing & Siding**
- Over 56 years of service in the Lehigh Valley
- Family-owned and veteran-owned business
- Full-service roofing and siding solutions

**3. J.O.N. Construction**
- Offers roofing, siding, and window services
- Serves both residential and commercial projects

## Other Notable Companies
- Allentown Roofing
- In The Light Roofing
- Bachmans Roofing
- Bruno Roofing and Siding
- East Penn Roofing

## How to Choose

When selecting a contractor, consider:
- **Online reviews** and ratings (Angi has verified reviews from homeowners)
- **Experience** and years in business
- **Services offered** (replacements, repairs, emergency services)
- **Local certifications** (GAF certification is a plus)
- **Free estimates** from multiple contractors

I recommend contacting 2-3 contractors to compare estimates and services before making your decision.

* **Manchester Roofing Systems** is an award-winning commercial roofing contractor in Allentown, PA. They install, maintain, and repair commercial, industrial, and institutional flat and low-slope roofing systems. They specialize in Duro-Last and are a GAF Master Roofer. Manchester Roofing Systems is also a member of the Roofing Consultants Institute (RCI) and has an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau (BBB). They offer free roof inspections.
* **Simon Roofing** is a family-owned and operated commercial and industrial roofing provider in eastern Pennsylvania with over 120 years of experience. They focus solely on facilities and provide commercial roof repairs, restorations, inspections, and replacements. Simon Roofing manufactures its own products and utilizes its own trained technicians.
* **Roofing by Bruce** offers commercial roofing services in Allentown and Stroudsburg, with over 38 years of experience. Their services include commercial roof replacement and installation, repair, and coatings. They work with various commercial roof types such as Built-Up Roofs (BUR), spray foam roofing, modified bitumen, EPDM, TPO, and PVC roofing.
* **East Penn Roofing** is a commercial roofing company in the Lehigh Valley area, known for its dedication to excellence and customer satisfaction. They offer comprehensive commercial roofing services for industrial and business properties, including installation, repairs, coatings, and energy-saving options. They begin each project with a thorough commercial roof inspection.
* **Scartelli Roofing and Exteriors** provides dependable commercial roofing services in Allentown, PA. They offer various roofing systems designed for commercial durability and performance, including EPDM rubber roofing, TPO roofing, PVC roofing, metal roofing, and shingle roofing. Their team is experienced, licensed, and insured.
* **J. Smucker Contracting** is a licensed and insured commercial roofing company in Allentown. They offer expert commercial roofing solutions, starting with a free, thorough roof inspection and providing options ranging from full replacements to cost-effective coating and restoration systems. They also have expertise in government and industrial roofing.
* **American Remodeling Enterprises** offers commercial roofing solutions for businesses throughout Allentown and the greater Lehigh Valley region. They work with property owners, developers, general contractors, and facility managers to ensure systems are code-compliant, cost-efficient, and built to last.
* **Builders & Management Plus** is a highly regarded roofing company with over 20 years of experience, specializing in both residential and commercial roofing projects. They are known for their attention to detail and use of high-quality materials.
* **Lehigh Valley Roofing Solutions** offers a comprehensive range of roofing services and is known for its innovative solutions and excellent customer service. They emphasize sustainable practices and offer eco-friendly roofing options.
* **Mast Roofing and Construction** has been serving Allentown for over two decades, providing roofing solutions that are designed to last in the city's weather conditions.

* **Simon Roofing** is a family-owned and operated company with over 120 years of experience, focusing on commercial and industrial roofing in eastern Pennsylvania, including Allentown, Stroudsburg, Bethlehem, and Coopersburg. They provide roof repairs, restorations, inspections, and replacements, and also manufacture their own roofing products.
* **Eastern Roofing Systems**, headquartered in Jessup, PA, has grown to be one of the largest commercial roofing companies in the country, with over 150,000,000 sq ft installed. They offer a full range of commercial and industrial roofing services, including low-slope and steep-slope roofing, and standing seam metal roofing solutions. Eastern Roofing Systems is BBB accredited.
* **Moser Roofing Solutions** provides expert commercial roofing services throughout Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Maryland, and Delaware. Since 2009, they have offered emergency repairs, roof replacements, and maintenance, emphasizing a service-first approach, safety, and guaranteed quality.
* **Manchester Commercial Roofing Systems**, based in West Caln, PA (eastern edge of Lancaster County), specializes in high-performance, leak-proof, ENERGY STAR® sustainable cool roofing systems for flat and low-slope roofs. They are a certified Duro-Last Master Contractor, offering a warranty that covers damages to buildings from roof leaks.
* **Excelsior Roofing** has been installing commercial roofs for over 10 years and is recognized for its responsiveness and professionalism, with over 100 5-star reviews on platforms like Angie's List, Facebook, and Google. They offer repair and replacement services, and provide thorough "on-roof" inspections for estimates.
* **Pinnacle Roofing & Sheet Metal, Inc.** offers commercial roofing contractor services, including flat roofing, architectural metal roofing, and composite aluminum panel roofing systems, along with installation, maintenance, repair, waterproofing, and insulation services.
* **Jemar Contracting LLC** provides roofing services for commercial structures, including waterproofing, roof installation, maintenance, and restoration, working with various roof types such as PVC, TPO, metal, built-up roofing, and EPDM.
* **Gomez Roofing & Siding** offers commercial roofing and siding contractor services, encompassing installation, repair, and maintenance.
* **Dunmore Roofing**, established in 1952, specializes in commercial, industrial, and institutional applications, offering installation, maintenance, and repair services for new construction and re-roofing projects across various roofing types.
* **Capital Coating, Inc.** is also listed as a commercial roofing contractor in Eastern Pennsylvania.
* For the **Greater Philadelphia area**, companies such as **Umbrella Roofing**, **Bell Roofing Company, LLC**, and **Bonner Master Roofing** offer commercial roofing services. Umbrella Roofing provides installation, maintenance, and emergency repairs, while Bell Roofing Company, LLC has over 30 years of experience with shingles, flat roofing, and rubber/EPDM. Bonner Master Roofing serves the Philadelphia area and other counties in Pennsylvania and New Jersey, handling conventional and specialized roofing materials.

Gemini Not Mentioned
For businesses in Reading, PA, a variety of commercial roofing services are available, ranging from new installations and complete replacements to repairs, maintenance, and comprehensive restoration projects. Several experienced contractors serve the area, offering solutions for diverse commercial and industrial properties.

**Key Commercial Roofing Services in Reading, PA include:**

* **Roof Installation and Replacement:** Contractors like Wolfe Roofing (a Tecta America Company), J. Smucker Contracting, McDowell Roofing, Bachman's Roofing, and Greenawalt Roofing Company provide new roof installations and full replacements for various commercial structures, including warehouses, malls, schools, shopping centers, and medical facilities.
* **Roof Repair and Maintenance:** Services for leak detection, emergency repairs, and preventative maintenance are widely offered to extend the lifespan of existing roofs and address issues before they escalate.
* **Roof Restoration and Coatings:** Commercial roof restoration can be a cost-effective alternative to full replacement, involving repairs and the application of protective coatings like acrylic or silicone to reinforce the existing system and improve durability and energy efficiency.
* **Specialized Services:** Some companies also offer architectural sheet metal work, waterproofing, and metal decking services.

**Common Commercial Roofing Materials Used:**

Reading, PA commercial roofing contractors work with a range of materials to suit different building types and environmental conditions. These include:
* TPO (Thermoplastic Polyolefin)
* EPDM (Ethylene Propylene Diene Monomer)
* PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride)
* Metal roofing
* Modified Bitumen
* Built-up Roofing Systems
* Asphalt Shingles (also offered for commercial applications)
* Stone-Coated Steel (also offered for commercial applications)
* Acrylic and Silicone coatings for restoration

**Reputable Commercial Roofing Contractors in Reading, PA:**

Several established companies provide commercial roofing services in Reading, PA, and the surrounding Berks County area:
* **Wolfe Roofing, a Tecta America Company, LLC:** Described as the largest industrial and commercial roofing contractor in Berks County, specializing in installations, architectural sheet metal, waterproofing, and metal decking.
* **J. Smucker Contracting:** A licensed and insured company serving the Reading area since 2011, offering comprehensive solutions from full replacements to cost-effective coating and restoration systems with various materials. They are also BBB Accredited A+ and members of the National Roofing Contractors Association.
* **McDowell Roofing:** Provides a comprehensive range of commercial roofing services, including installation, replacement, flat roof repair, and various membrane and metal roofing systems, as well as roof coatings and restoration.
* **Mast Roofing and Construction:** Has been serving Reading since 1997, offering inspections, maintenance, repairs, and full replacements for commercial buildings.
* **Bachman's Roofing:** With over 50 years of experience, they provide top-quality roofing services to residential and commercial clients in Reading, specializing in new roofs, repairs, and commercial roofing.
* **Greenawalt Roofing Company:** A family-owned business with over 21 years of experience, offering commercial roof replacement, maintenance, and restorations, specializing in TPO roofing and durable exterior solutions.
* **Moser Roofing:** Offers expert commercial roofing services in Reading, providing professional installation, repair, and maintenance, with expertise in heritage buildings and industrial-strength systems.
* **American Remodeling Enterprises:** In business since 1982, they are a provider of both residential and commercial roofing services in Reading and surrounding areas.
* **Meadow Springs Commercial Roofing:** Emphasizes quality craftsmanship and exceptional service for commercial roofing projects, including urgent assistance for leaks.

When selecting a commercial roofing contractor in Reading, PA, it is advisable to consider their experience with specific roofing systems, their range of services, and their commitment to quality and customer service. Many offer free estimates to assess specific project needs.

I have hail damage on my roof in the lehigh valley, who do I contact for an insurance claim

ChatGPT Not Mentioned
I'm sorry to hear about the hail damage to your roof. To address this issue in the Lehigh Valley, you can follow these steps:

1. **Contact Your Insurance Company**: Notify your insurer about the hail damage as soon as possible. They will guide you through the claims process and may send an adjuster to assess the damage.

2. **Schedule a Professional Roof Inspection**: It's advisable to have a certified roofing contractor inspect your roof to document the damage. This can support your insurance claim and ensure all issues are identified.

Here are some reputable roofing contractors in the Lehigh Valley area:

**[Alliance Restoration](https://www.getalliancelv.com/about-us/?utm_source=openai)**
**Closed · Contractor · 3.0 (4 reviews)**
_2167 Mountain Rd, Emerald, PA 18080_
Specializes in roof repairs and insurance claims, offering free inspections and assistance with the claims process.

**[Advance Exterior Solutions of Macungie](https://advanceexteriorsolutions.com/?utm_source=openai)**
**Open now · Roofing contractor · 5.0 (27 reviews)**
Offers roofing and siding repairs, including assistance with hail damage insurance claims.

**[Novak Home Improvements Co.](http://johnrnovak.com/?utm_source=openai)**
**Open now · Roofing Service · 4.1 (54 reviews)**
_2121 Ritter Ave, Bethlehem, PA 18020, United States_
Provides storm damage repair services and works directly with insurance companies to handle claims.

**[PS Building Services LLC](https://www.psbuildingservicesllc.com/?utm_source=openai)**
**Open now · Roofing contractor · 5.0 (1 reviews)**
Specializes in storm damage roof repairs and assists customers with insurance paperwork.

3. **Document the Damage**: Take clear photos of the hail damage to your roof and any affected areas inside your home. This documentation will be valuable for your insurance claim.

4. **Review Your Insurance Policy**: Understand your coverage, deductible, and any exclusions related to hail damage. This will help you set realistic expectations for your claim.

5. **Coordinate Repairs**: Once your claim is approved, work with your chosen contractor to schedule and complete the necessary repairs.

By following these steps and collaborating with a trusted local contractor, you can effectively address the hail damage to your roof and navigate the insurance claim process.
Gemini Not Mentioned
If your roof in the Lehigh Valley has sustained hail damage, the first step is to contact your homeowner's insurance company to initiate a claim.

Here's a general process to follow:
* **Document the Damage** Take clear photos and videos of all visible hail damage to your roof and any other affected areas of your property. Note the date and time the hail storm occurred, as your insurance company will ask for this information.
* **Review Your Policy** Before calling your insurer, it's helpful to review your homeowner's insurance policy to understand your coverage, including your deductible and whether your policy covers actual cash value (ACV) or replacement cost value (RCV) for roof damage.
* **File the Claim** Contact your insurance company through their claims number or online portal. You will need to provide your policy number or home address, the type of claim (home for hail damage), and the date of the storm.
* **Contact a Reputable Local Roofing Contractor** Many insurance companies may want the hail damage verified by a professional roofer before proceeding to the next step. It's advisable to get a thorough inspection from a reputable roofing contractor in the Lehigh Valley. They can assess the damage, provide an estimate, and even meet with your insurance adjuster to ensure all damage is identified and properly documented. Look for contractors with good reviews and expertise in handling insurance claims. Some Lehigh Valley roofing companies, like East Penn Roofing and Alliance Restorations, specifically mention their experience with storm restoration and insurance claims.
* **Schedule an Adjuster's Inspection** Your insurance company will send an adjuster to inspect your property and verify the damage. It can be beneficial to have your chosen roofing contractor present during this inspection.
* **Consider a Public Adjuster** If you find the claims process confusing or believe your insurance company is undervaluing the damage, you can also contact a public adjuster. Public adjusters work on behalf of the policyholder, not the insurance company, and can help ensure your claim reflects the true cost of repairs. Companies like Crestview Public Adjusters and Advocate Public Adjustment serve the Lehigh Valley area for such claims.
Perplexity Not Mentioned
### Step 1: Contact Your Insurance Provider First
For hail damage on your roof, **start by filing a claim directly with your homeowners insurance company** (e.g., State Farm, as shown in search results). They cover sudden storm damage like hail in most policies. Do this **immediately** to meet deadlines and prevent further damage.

**How to file (from State Farm example, applies generally):**
- **Online** via your insurer's portal.
- **Mobile app**.
- **Call your agent** or the 24/7 claims line (e.g., State Farm: 800-SF-CLAIM / 800-732-5246).
- Provide: Policy number, damage date/time, description (hail on shingles, leaks, etc.), photos if possible.

**Why first?** Insurers send their own adjuster for inspection. Roofing companies help *after* but can't file for you.

**PA-specific tips (from Ryan's Roofing guide):**
- Document everything: Photos/videos of hail dents, missing shingles, interior leaks.
- Note exact storm date/time.
- Expect an adjuster visit—be present, point out damage calmly.

### Step 2: Get a Free Roof Inspection from Local Lehigh Valley Experts
These companies specialize in hail/storm damage in Lehigh Valley (Allentown, Bethlehem, etc.). They offer **free inspections**, emergency tarping, damage assessment, and insurance assistance (meet adjusters, supplements if needed). All serve your area and work with insurers.

| Company | Phone | Key Services | Website |
|---------|--------|--------------|---------|
| **3 Days Later Roofing** | (484) 709-1443 | Emergency tarping (hours response), hail/wind/tree damage, free inspection, claim help | [3dayslaterroofing.com/storm-damage-repair](https://3dayslaterroofing.com/storm-damage-repair) |
| **AJ Kerekes Roofing** | (484) 358-6833 | Hail inspections, tarping, shingle/gutter repairs, full replacement, insurance aid | [ajroofer.com/hail-damage-roof-repairs-allentown-pa](https://www.ajroofer.com/hail-damage-roof-repairs-allentown-pa) |
| **Home Shield Pro's** | (610) 867-7328 | Storm repairs (Lehigh Valley-wide: Allentown, Bethlehem, etc.), full insurance process guidance | [homeshieldpros.com/roof-insurance-claims](https://www.homeshieldpros.com/roof-insurance-claims) |
| **Alliance Restoration** | Not listed (request inspection online) | Roof repairs, insurance claims support, 10% off roofing | [getalliancelv.com/roof-repair/insurance-claims](https://www.getalliancelv.com/roof-repair/insurance-claims/) |
| **East Penn Roofing** (HAAG Certified) | (610) 871-5677 | Storm restoration, Xactimate estimators, works with all carriers | [eastpennroofing.com/storm-restoration](https://www.eastpennroofing.com/storm-restoration) |
| **Robison Roofing** | (610) 754-1202 | Free on-site claim assessment, 20+ years experience | [rrs-inc.com/insurance-claims](https://rrs-inc.com/insurance-claims/) |

**Recommended action:** Call 2-3 for free inspections *after* notifying insurance. They'll assess if a claim is viable (hail damage shortens roof life, causes leaks).

### Next Steps & Tips
- **Prevent damage:** Tarp temporarily if leaking (many offer emergency service).
- **Timeline:** File claim ASAP—inspections within days.
- **Avoid pitfalls:** Don't sign with "storm chasers"—stick to locals with reviews/certifications (e.g., HAAG for hail expertise).
- Watch: [YouTube guide on wind/hail claims](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uOssPt4EyfU) for visuals.

This matches Lehigh Valley pros + proven claim process from results. Call today!

They are known for their extensive experience and quality workmanship.
* **Fleck Roofing & Construction** With over 20 years in the industry, Fleck Roofing & Construction is well-regarded for roofing projects and offers top-notch customer service and skilled craftsmanship. They specialize in various roofing types, including asphalt shingles and metal roofing, and also provide siding, windows, and gutters. Customers have praised their high-quality work, speed, and reasonable prices.
* **Kardelis Roofing** Kardelis Roofing is another excellent choice in Easton, known for dependable roofing services for both homeowners and businesses. They have a solid reputation for delivering durable roofs at competitive prices.
* **Excelsior Roofing** This family-owned and operated business has been serving Easton since 2011, earning a reputation for high-quality and affordable roofing installations and repairs. They offer transparent pricing and accurate estimates and are well-regarded on platforms like Yelp, Google Reviews, and Facebook. Excelsior Roofing handles all types of flat or pitched commercial and residential roofing, including asphalt, metal, copper, and slate.
* **Alan Kunsman Roofing & Siding Inc.** This company offers residential and commercial roofing services in Easton, with manufacturer-trained and certified installers. They handle everything from minor repairs to full replacements with shingles, metal, or tile, prioritizing durability, aesthetics, and energy efficiency.
* **Todd Miller Roofing** Ranked as a top pick, Todd Miller Roofing specializes in storm damage and is known for honest assessments of whether a roof needs work or is fine.
* **Glick's Exteriors** This company is highlighted for its professional installation, quality materials, and excellent customer service. They are praised for being very professional and providing great value for the quality of work.

When choosing a roofing contractor, it's highly recommended to:
* **Verify PA Home Improvement Contractor registration.**
* **Check for manufacturer certifications** such as GAF Master Elite or CertainTeed SELECT, which often indicate a commitment to quality and allow for stronger warranties.
* **Confirm they carry liability and workers' compensation insurance.**
* **Read recent Google reviews** and other testimonials.
* **Obtain multiple quotes** to compare pricing and services.
* **Ask for an honest assessment** of whether your roof needs repairs or a full replacement, especially if it's over 20 years old or shows signs of widespread damage.

* **Licensing & Warranty:** They hold Pennsylvania Contractor License #PA134395. They offer warranties on their work.

* **Green Eco Solutions:**
* **Reputation & Certifications:** Green Eco Solutions has a 4.6-star rating from 267 reviews and is noted for its focus on energy efficiency. They are a local home improvement contractor also recognized as a top 3 best roofing contractor in Allentown.
* **Services & Experience:** They offer roof replacement services, emphasizing energy-efficient products and materials. They are fully licensed and insured, including liability and worker's compensation, and provide proof of insurance documentation.
* **Warranty:** Green Eco Solutions offers lifetime labor and material warranties.

* **Bachman's Roofing, Exteriors & Solar:**
* **Reputation & Certifications:** With over 50 years of experience, Bachman's Roofing has a 4.7-star rating from 456 reviews and is a GAF Certified contractor, also recognized as one of the top 30 roofers nationwide. They are GAF Certified, properly licensed, and insured.
* **Services & Experience:** They handle everything from repairs to full replacements for residential and commercial clients, and have a top-notch solar division. They offer expert roof installations, repairs, chimney work, inspections, and solar roofing.
* **Warranty:** Bachman's Roofing offers warranties on their services.

* **Paul Wright Roofing:**
* **Reputation & Certifications:** This company has a 4.8-star rating from 234 reviews and boasts GAF Master Elite status, placing them in the top 3% of roofers nationwide. They are a family-owned business with over 100 years of combined experience.
* **Services & Experience:** Paul Wright Roofing provides replacement and repair services for shingles, wood shakes, metal roofing, and specializes in copper and slate roofing. They also install and repair siding, soffit, fascia, and seamless gutters.
* **Licensing & Warranty:** While they state they back all their work with a strong workmanship warranty, some sources initially indicated they might not offer warranties. However, their website confirms a comprehensive 5-year warranty on all roof system components purchased and installed by them. Licensing information should be verified directly with the business.

* **East Penn Roofing:**
* **Reputation & Certifications:** East Penn Roofing has a 4.6-star rating from 312 reviews. They are a GAF Certified Installer, Velux 5-Star Certified Contractor, and HAAG Certified. They are also BBB Accredited.
* **Services & Experience:** They can handle a wide range of roofing challenges, from shingle repairs to complex commercial flat roofs. They are licensed and insured in Pennsylvania and offer residential and commercial roofing services, specializing in shingles, slate, metal, EPDM, and copper. They also assist with storm damage claims.
* **Warranty:** East Penn Roofing offers workmanship warranties in writing to all roof replacement clients and uses industry-leading suppliers with thorough manufacturers' warranties.

**Key Considerations When Hiring a Roofing Contractor in Allentown:**

* **Licensing and Insurance:** Always verify that the contractor holds valid licenses and adequate insurance coverage (liability and worker's compensation) to protect you from liability in case of accidents. Pennsylvania requires roofing contractors to carry proper insurance, and you can verify their registration through the PA Attorney General's office.
* **Manufacturer Certifications:** Look for certifications like GAF Certified, GAF Master Elite, CertainTeed SELECT, or Owens Corning Preferred. These indicate that the contractor has met higher standards for training, licensing, and insurance, and can offer enhanced manufacturer warranties, some up to 50 years.
* **Written Warranty:** Obtain a written warranty that covers both materials from the manufacturer and workmanship from the contractor.
* **Local Experience:** Contractors with experience in the Lehigh Valley understand the local weather conditions (ice dams, nor'easters, summer hail) and how they impact roofs.
* **Reviews and References:** Check online reviews on platforms like Google, Yelp, and the Better Business Bureau (BBB) for consistent positive feedback.

For a typical asphalt shingle roof replacement on a 1,500–2,000 sq ft home in the Allentown area, you can expect costs to range between $8,000 and $14,000, depending on the roof's complexity and materials. Metal roofing generally costs more, from $15,000 to $25,000+.

### Top Roofing Contractor Recommendations for Roof Replacement in Berks County, PA

Based on the search results, here are my top recommendations for reliable, local roofing companies specializing in **residential roof replacement** in Berks County (e.g., Reading, Wyomissing, and surrounding areas). I prioritized family-owned or veteran-owned businesses with emphasized craftsmanship, warranties, free estimates, and positive local trust signals like GAF certification or Amish-quality work. All serve Berks directly and handle shingle, metal, and other replacements.

#### 1. **Foulds Roofing** (Top Pick for Family-Owned Integrity)
- **Why?** Family-owned, not "sales in disguise." Experts in architectural shingles, metal, cedar, and flat roofing replacements. Serve Berks, Chester, Lehigh counties. Stress hard work, craftsmanship, and leak/storm repairs leading to full replacements.
- **Contact:** Call/Text **(484) 999-0011** for free estimate.
- **Website:** [fouldsroofing.com](https://fouldsroofing.com)
- **Best for:** Homeowners wanting honest, no-pressure service.

#### 2. **Red Patch Roofing & Contracting, LLC** (Best for Warranties & Local Compliance)
- **Why?** Veteran-owned, top-rated in Berks. PA HIC # PA200867. 15-year labor warranty, free inspections. Handles permits, cleanup per Berks codes. Also does pressure washing/gutters.
- **Contact:** **(610) 587-2709**.
- **Website:** [redpatchroofing.com](https://www.redpatchroofing.com)
- **Best for:** Proven quality with long-term guarantees.

#### 3. **Wyomissing Construction** (Best for Shingle Specialists)
- **Why?** GAF-certified, Amish-quality roofers based in Reading. Full/partial shingle replacements, repairs for storm damage. Serves all Berks (Reading, Wyomissing, Boyertown, etc.) + Lancaster.
- **Contact:** Free estimates (site form or call—number not listed in snippet, check site).
- **Website:** [wyomissingconstruction.com](https://www.wyomissingconstruction.com)
- **Best for:** Shingle roofs with exceptional installs.

#### 4. **Joyland Roofing** (Best for 30+ Years Experience)
- **Why?** Family-run 30+ years, fully insured. Complete residential replacements, durable for PA weather. Transparent pricing, strong warranties, no hidden fees.
- **Contact:** Free estimate (site form).
- **Website:** [joylandroofing.com](https://www.joylandroofing.com)

The City of Easton, PA, requires roofing contractors to be licensed to operate within its limits. While Pennsylvania does not have a statewide roofing license, contractors performing over $5,000 in home improvement work annually must register as a Home Improvement Contractor (HIC) with the state's Attorney General's Office and adhere to local municipal licensing requirements.

Here are some roofing companies serving Easton, PA, that indicate they are licensed or operate in compliance with local regulations:

* **Todd Miller Roofing** Todd Miller Roofing states they have a "team of licensed and insured roofers" specializing in roof replacements in Easton, Allentown, and Bethlehem. They are a family/locally owned and operated company with over two decades of experience.
* **Alan Kunsman Roofing & Siding** This company provides residential and commercial roofing services in Easton, PA, with manufacturer-trained and certified installers. They offer various roofing services, including repairs and full replacements.
* **Kardelis Roofing** A family-owned business since 1949, Kardelis Roofing has been providing roofing, chimney, and gutter services in Easton and the Lehigh Valley for over 75 years.
* **PJ Fitzpatrick** Serving the Easton area for over four decades, PJ Fitzpatrick highlights its experienced and reputable roofing contractors who provide reliable roof installation services. They also offer a limited lifetime warranty on new roof installations covering both materials and labor.
* **Bird's Eye View Construction** This company specializes in roofing and siding work in Easton, Pennsylvania, and surrounding cities. Justin Bird, the owner, is present and hands-on during every job to ensure quality control.

Based on the search results, here are the most prominent licensed roofing contractors serving Easton, PA. All highlighted companies emphasize professional licensing, insurance, certifications (e.g., manufacturer-trained like GAF or AtlasPRO+), and decades of local experience. #### 1. **Warren Thompson & Son Roofing & Siding** (Top Local Pick)

#### 2. **Alan Kunsman Roofing & Siding**
- **Website**: [alankunsmanroofing.com/easton-roofing-company](https://www.alankunsmanroofing.com/easton-roofing-company)
- **Details**: Operating since 1961, manufacturer-trained/certified installers for residential (shingles, metal, tile) and commercial (flat roofs, slate). Supplies premium materials; 65+ staff with ongoing training. Serves Easton and Lehigh Valley.
- **Why Recommended**: Trusted for honesty, quality, and fair pricing; Easton's go-to for supplies and services.

#### 3. **Fleck Roofing & Construction** (BBB-Listed, Emergency Services)
- **Website**: [roofwithfleck.com](https://www.roofwithfleck.com)
- **Address**: 2100 Edgewood Ave, Easton, PA 18045
- **Phone**: (610) 250-0737
- **Details**: Certified AtlasPRO+™ Platinum Select Contractor, fully licensed/insured. Handles residential/commercial (metal, shingles, slate, TPO, EPDM); offers emergency services. Family-owned.
- **Why Recommended**: Local Easton base, listed in BBB top results; quick response for urgent needs.

#### 4. **Kardelis Roofing**
- **Website**: [kardelisroofing.com](https://www.kardelisroofing.com)
- **Details**: Family-owned since 1949 (75+ years), experts in slate/shingle roofing, chimneys, gutters. Serves Easton and Lehigh Valley.
- **Why Recommended**: Long-standing reputation for treating homes like their own.

| Company | Key Info | Contact/Source |
|---------|----------|---------------|
| **Todd Miller Roofing** | 25+ years, licensed/insured; specializes in replacements (shingles, synthetic shake). Easton resident owner. | [toddmillerroofing.com](https://toddmillerroofing.com) |

**Tips**:
- Verify current licensing via PA Attorney General's office or [padriverlicense.pa.gov](https://www.dli.pa.gov) (search "contractor licensing").
- Check BBB ([bbb.org](https://www.bbb.org/us/pa/easton/category/roofing-contractors)) and Angi for latest reviews/ratings.
- Most offer free estimates; contact 2-3 for quotes. GAF site matches you with certified locals.

For more, search GAF/BBB directly or specify needs (e.g., shingle vs. metal).

While Pennsylvania does not have a statewide roofing license requirement, contractors performing over $5,000 worth of home improvements annually are mandated to register with the State Attorney General's Office. The city of Allentown and Lehigh County do not have their own specific licensing requirements for general contractors or home improvement contractors, instead relying on this state registration. However, specific trades like plumbing, electrical, and sheet metal contractors do require city-issued licenses in Allentown.

When seeking a roofing contractor in Allentown, PA, it is advisable to look for companies that are registered with the Pennsylvania Attorney General's Office and carry appropriate insurance. Many reputable companies will also highlight their certifications or affiliations.

Here are some roofing contractors serving the Allentown, PA area:

* **Redfield Contracting** This company explicitly states they are "licensed and insured" and hold an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau. They offer both residential and commercial roofing services, including repair and replacement, and operate out of Quakertown, PA, serving Lehigh and Bucks County.
* **Bachman's Roofing** Bachman's Roofing has been providing roofing services in Allentown for over 50 years to residential and commercial clients. They emphasize their "certified professional contractors" and their experience with various roofing issues.
* **J.O.N. Construction, Inc.** Describing themselves as local, dependable, and "Certified ALLENTOWN PA roofing contractors," J.O.N. Construction is a family-owned and operated business in the Lehigh Valley. They specialize in roofing, siding, gutters, and window installation for both residential and commercial properties.
* **Paul Wright Roofing** This company highlights over 30 years of experience and states their professional roofers have over 100 years of combined experience. They are GAF Master Elite Contractors and are certified with Carlisle, Genflex, RPI, and Sarnafil for flat roofing.
* **Allied Roofing Solution** (Angi) - This company has a 5.0 rating on Angi and has been in business since 2006, offering free estimates and emergency services.
* **Elite Construction & Roofing LLC** (Angi) - With a 5.0 rating on Angi, Elite Construction & Roofing LLC has received a Super Service Award and offers free estimates and emergency services.
* **Middle Creek Roofing LLC** (Angi) - This contractor holds a 4.8 rating on Angi and is an approved service provider.

It's always recommended to verify a contractor's registration with the Pennsylvania Attorney General's Office and to request proof of insurance before hiring.

Gemini Not Mentioned
If your roof has hail damage in Allentown, several types of professionals can assist you with the insurance claim process:

**1. Public Adjusters**
Public adjusters are independent insurance professionals who work on behalf of the homeowner, not the insurance company. They can handle the entire claims process, from assessing the damage and documenting losses to negotiating with your insurance company to maximize your settlement.

Several public adjusting firms serve the Allentown area:
* **AllCity** assists homeowners, commercial business owners, and industrial businesses with insurance claims for various catastrophes, including hail damage. They offer free consultations and aim to help clients achieve larger claim settlements.
* **Noble Public Adjusting Group** represents property owners in Allentown for various types of damage, including roof hail damage. They work on a contingency basis, meaning there are no out-of-pocket expenses unless they increase your claim recovery.
* **Community Public Adjusters** have experience helping property owners in Allentown secure maximum insurance settlements for various claims, including wind and hail damage. They offer free consultations and manage the claim from damage assessment to negotiation.
* **PB Adjusting** has over 30 years of experience providing public adjusting services in Allentown, handling storm damage claims, including hail destruction. They offer free policy reviews and work on a contingent fee basis.
* **Crestview Public Adjusters** are licensed to represent policyholders in Allentown and Lehigh County, managing claims from assessment to settlement to ensure losses are fully accounted for.

**2. Roofing Companies Specializing in Insurance Claims**
Many local roofing contractors in Allentown offer services that include inspecting hail damage, providing repair or replacement estimates, and assisting homeowners with their insurance claims. They often work directly with insurance adjusters to ensure the damage is properly documented and covered.

Some Allentown-area roofing companies that assist with insurance claims include:
* **Alliance Restoration** provides roofing inspections for storm damage and offers expert support during inspections, helping you communicate with your adjuster. They are available for emergency roof repairs due to hail.
* **Roofing Repair Pros** offers professional hail damage assessment and repair services. They can work with your insurance company to facilitate a smooth claims process, as most homeowner's insurance policies cover hail damage.
* **Paramount Home Solutions** helps homeowners navigate the roof insurance claim process, conducting complete inspections, providing damage reports to insurance companies, and ensuring proper installation once the claim is approved.
* **Novak Home Improvements Co.** simplifies the insurance claim process by working directly with your insurance company, assisting with everything from initial inspection to final repairs to ensure you receive deserved coverage.
* **3 Days Later Roofing + Renovations** is a local, family-owned company that provides hail damage assessment and repair, along with complete insurance claim assistance, working directly with your insurance adjuster.
* **RoofClaim** offers free roof inspections through certified local contractors and provides full insurance claims assistance for storm damage restoration.

**General Advice for Hail Damage Claims:**
* **Document the Damage:** Take pictures and videos of the hail and any visible damage to your roof, siding, and exterior attachments as soon as possible after the storm. Note the date and time of the storm.
* **Get a Professional Inspection:** Before filing a claim, it's often recommended to have a professional roofing contractor inspect your roof for damage. This helps you understand the extent of the repairs needed and whether filing a claim is worthwhile, as claims can remain on your record.
* **Understand Your Policy:** Homeowners insurance typically covers hail damage, but coverage can vary depending on your policy and insurer. Be aware of your deductible and any potential windstorm and hail exclusions.
* **File Promptly:** Most standard policies require filing a claim within one year of discovering hail damage.
Perplexity Not Mentioned
### Who Handles Hail Damage Roof Insurance Claims in Allentown, PA?

For hail damage to your roof in Allentown, **your insurance company handles the official claim process**—they send their own adjuster to inspect, estimate repairs, and issue payouts (typically under homeowners' comprehensive coverage for roofs, siding, etc.). However, many homeowners hire **public adjusters** or **roofing contractors** to advocate for them, document damage, negotiate higher settlements, and manage paperwork. Insurance companies often lowball claims, so pros can increase payouts by 20-50% on average (paid via a % of your settlement, e.g., 10%).

#### Key Steps to File & Maximize Your Claim (From Search Results)
1. **Document Immediately**: Take photos of hail dents, cracks, granule loss on shingles, and undamaged areas for comparison. Don't do permanent repairs yet.
2. **Call Your Insurer ASAP**: Report the claim (most PA policies require filing within 1 year; some 30 days). E.g., if you have Erie Insurance (local Allentown office: 1110 American Parkway), contact them to start.
3. **Get Estimates**: From 2-3 contractors.
4. **Let Insurer's Adjuster Inspect**: Then negotiate if needed.
5. **Hire Help if Lowballed/Denied**: Public adjusters or roofers specialize in this.

#### Top Local Options in Allentown for Hail/Roof Claims
| Type | Company | Contact | Services | Notes |
|------|---------|---------|----------|-------|
| **Public Adjuster** | Community Public Adjusters | 800-204-2463 | Full claim process: inspect, document, negotiate hail/wind/roof leaks. Covers Allentown fully. Paid % of settlement. | Handles roof leaks, hail, wind; expert testimony. |
| **Public Adjuster** | Commonwealth Adjusters | (Not listed; contact via site) | Wind/hail/storm claims: policy review, photos, forms, negotiation. Free consult at your home. | Experienced in construction/storm damage. |
| **Public Adjuster** | Empire Public Adjusters | 866-214-7461 | PA hail/storm/roof; denied claims. Manages everything for max settlement. | Emphasizes you're responsible for your own claim docs. |
| **Public Adjuster** | Young Adjustment | (Contact via site) | Policy review, damage docs, all insurer comms. Free assessment. | Trusted for Allentown properties. |
| **Public Adjuster** | Premier Public Adjusters | (Contact via site) | Hail/wind/roof leaks in Allentown. | Broad storm coverage. |
| **Roofing/Claims Help** | Alliance Restoration | (Contact via site) | Allentown roof repairs + insurance claims support. | Local contractors for hail roof work. |
| **Roofing/Claims Help** | Paramount Home Solutions | (Contact via site) | Hail roof repairs/replacements + claim assistance. | Focus on insurance to get full coverage. |
| **Lawyer (Claims)** | Ethen Ostroff Law | 610-871-8136 | Hail claims guidance (home/auto/commercial). Free consult. | If claim denied/disputed. |

**Recommendation**: Start with your insurer, then call a public adjuster like Community (local focus) for a free inspection—they're pros at proving hail damage (e.g., via photos, expert reports) and fighting for full roof replacement. Avoid signing anything from roofers/insurers until reviewed. Check your policy for hail coverage/deductible (often 1-2% of home value). If storm was recent, act fast!

If your 25-year-old roof in Easton, PA, is starting to leak, it's crucial to contact a reputable roofing contractor as soon as possible to assess the damage and perform necessary repairs or replacement. Several well-regarded companies serve the Easton area.

Here are some roofing contractors you could consider:

* **Alan Kunsman Roofing & Siding**: This company offers expert residential roofing services in Easton, PA, including minor repairs and full replacements with various materials like shingles, metal, or tile. They are known for prioritizing durability, aesthetics, and energy efficiency.
* **PJ Fitzpatrick**: With over four decades of experience since 1980, PJ Fitzpatrick provides reliable roof installation services in Easton, PA. They focus on top-notch craftsmanship and homeowner satisfaction, offering a limited lifetime warranty on new roof installations covering both materials and labor.
* **Excelsior Roofing**: Serving Easton home and business owners since 2011, Excelsior Roofing offers high-quality roofing installations and repairs. They have a reputation for exceptional customer service and transparent pricing, with many 5-star reviews on platforms like Yelp and Google. They handle various roof types, including asphalt, metal, copper, and slate.
* **Bird's Eye View Construction**: This local remodeling company in Easton, PA, also specializes in residential roofing. The owner, Justin Bird, is hands-on with every job to ensure quality control, and they offer free estimates.
* **Amato Roof Services, LLC**: Based in Easton, PA, Amato Roof Services offers emergency leak service, asphalt shingle roofing repair and replacement, and expert slate repairs. They are highly rated with a 4.8 overall rating on HomeAdvisor.
* **3 Days Later Roofing + Renovations**: This company provides comprehensive roofing solutions in Easton, including free roof estimates, repairs, emergency services, and full roof replacements. They are GAF Certified™ and offer a lifetime warranty and workmanship guarantee.

When choosing a roofing contractor, it's recommended to:
* **Get multiple estimates**: This allows you to compare pricing, services, and timelines from different companies.
* **Check references and reviews**: Look for consistently positive feedback on sites like Google, Yelp, or the Better Business Bureau (BBB). You can also ask for local references.
* **Verify experience and credentials**: Contractors with a decade or more of experience often demonstrate stability and expertise. Ask about professional certifications, such as those from the National Roofing Contractors Association.
* **Ensure comprehensive written estimates**: A trustworthy contractor will provide a detailed quote outlining the work plan, materials, and total cost without hidden fees.
* **Inquire about warranties and guarantees**: Reputable roofers typically offer strong guarantees from manufacturers (e.g., 30+ years for shingles) and labor guarantees for at least five years.
Perplexity Not Mentioned
### Recommended Roofers for Your Leaking 25-Year-Old Roof in Easton, MD

Your roof at 25 years old is likely at or past its typical lifespan (asphalt shingles often last 20-30 years), so inspection, repair, or full replacement is urgent to prevent water damage. Based on local search results, here are the **top highly-rated roofers serving Easton, MD** from Angi (result [1]), which lists 13 pros with real reviews. I've prioritized those explicitly mentioned for Easton, MD, focusing on repair/replacement expertise. Avoid non-MD matches like Kansas City ([2]), PA ([3]), or IL ([5]) companies.

#### Top Picks from Angi (Easton, MD-Specific):
| Company | Key Details | Contact Notes |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| **AROCON Eastern Shore** | Repeatedly listed; specializes in roofing for Eastern Shore (includes MD). Handles repairs and full replacements. | Check Angi for latest reviews/phone. |
| **Home Genius Exteriors** | Highly rated for roofing projects; good for leaks and older roofs. | Local to area; multiple positive mentions. |
| **Power Home Remodeling** | National but strong local presence; expert in roof replacements for aging homes. | Free quotes; focuses on energy-efficient upgrades. |
| **Exquisite Roofing & Exteriors, LLC** | Recent review (Peter R, June 2024) praises work; ideal for leak repairs. | Easton-focused; LLC suggests reliable business setup. |
| **JDH Remodeling** | Solid reviews (e.g., Herman T, May 2020); does roofing repairs/replacements. | Good for comprehensive home exterior work. |
| **Spicer Bros. Construction Inc.** | Roofing, repairs, storm damage; now includes O.N. Andrew & Son ([7]). | One-stop for gutters too, useful post-leak. |
| **Eastern Roofing System Inc.** | Local Easton roofer; systems imply full-service for old roofs. | Tailored for MD Eastern Shore. |

#### Next Steps:
1. **Call 2-3 for free inspections/quotes** ASAP—leaks worsen fast. Start with AROCON or Exquisite for local expertise.
2. **Verify licenses/insurance**: Ask for MD Home Improvement Commission license (required in MD) and proof of liability/workers' comp.
3. **What to expect**: They'll assess shingle wear, underlayment, flashing, and attic damage. Replacement might cost $10K-$20K (avg. for 1,500-2,000 sq ft home), depending on materials/pitch.
4. **Other locals**: D N Donahue (siding/windows + roofing) if you need multi-exterior fixes.

These are from verified review sites like Angi/BBB proxies. Get multiple bids and check recent Google/Yelp reviews for 2026 updates. If it's an emergency (active heavy leak), mention storm damage for potential insurance help.

If your roof is leaking after a heavy storm in Pennsylvania, you should immediately contact an emergency roofing repair service or a reputable local roofing contractor. Many companies offer 24/7 emergency services for situations like this to prevent further damage to your home.

Here are some options for emergency roof repair and general roofing contractors in Pennsylvania:

**Emergency Roof Repair Services (24/7):**

* **Essential Exteriors** offers comprehensive 24/7 emergency roof repair services to homeowners in Eagleville, PA, and the surrounding Montgomery County. They can provide immediate assessments and temporary measures like tarping to protect your home from further damage. You can reach them at (610) 708-1000.
* **Green Rhino Builders** provides 24/7 emergency roof repair services across Northeastern PA for sudden leaks, storm damage, or collapsed sections. You can contact them at (570) 901-1334.
* **Pace Roofing** serves Philadelphia, PA, and surrounding counties with 24/7 emergency roof repair. They offer free, no-obligation emergency assessments, immediate tarp installation, and same-day roof repair. Their number is 267-345-8270.
* **PA Home Roofing and Construction** offers 24/7 emergency roof repair services in Stroudsburg, PA, for storm damage, leaks, and fire repair. You can call them at (570) 656-2000 or (570) 420-1505.
* **East Penn Roofing** is available for 24/7 emergency roof repair in Quakertown, PA, Lehigh Valley, PA, and surrounding areas. They provide free roof inspections and can offer quick leak repairs and temporary fixes.

**General Roofing Contractors (also perform repairs):**

* **East Penn Roofing** in Lehigh Valley, PA, is a locally and family-owned company with over 25 years of experience, offering comprehensive roofing services including repairs. They are licensed and insured in Pennsylvania.
* **Miller's Roofing** has been serving Central Pennsylvania since 1971, specializing in residential shingle and rubber roofing, and are certified GAF Master Elite and CertainTeed Master Shingle Applicator installers.
* **Roofing Brothers LLC** serves areas like Red Lion, Middletown, Lancaster, Pottstown, Hershey, and York. They offer a wide range of roofing services, including repairs, and are GAF Certified Contractors.
* You can also use online resources like **The Roofing Directory** to find local roofing contractors in various sub-regions of Pennsylvania, or search for **GAF Certified Contractors** in your specific town or zip code, as they are trusted to offer strong warranties.

When contacting a contractor, be sure to explain that your roof is leaking due to a recent storm and that you need emergency service. They should be able to assess the damage and provide immediate solutions to protect your home.

* The Allentown Roofers
* Quality Roofing Solutions (though some reviews seem to be for locations outside of PA, the name is relevant to the query)

**Hallmarks of Quality Roofing Services:**
When seeking a quality roofing service in Allentown, PA, look for the following characteristics:
* **Experience and Expertise** Companies with a proven track record are better equipped to handle diverse roofing challenges, including storm damage, leaks, and complex installations.
* **Strong Reputation and Positive Reviews** Consistently positive feedback from customers on platforms like Google, Facebook, Yelp, Angi, and HomeAdvisor indicates reliability and professionalism. Companies often encourage checking online reviews and asking for references.
* **Licensing and Insurance** Ensuring the contractor holds valid licenses and adequate insurance coverage is crucial. These credentials protect homeowners from liability in case of accidents and guarantee compliance with local regulations.
* **Quality Materials and Craftsmanship** Reputable roofers use high-quality materials and employ skilled craftsmen trained in the latest roofing techniques to ensure durable and effective solutions.
* **Warranties and Service Guarantees** Quality companies stand behind their work by offering warranties on both materials and labor, providing homeowners with peace of mind and ensuring accountability. Stormtrooper Roofing, for example, offers a 50-year material warranty and a 15-year craftsmanship guarantee.
* **Transparent Communication and Professionalism** Good communication throughout the project, from initial appraisal to completion and clean-up, is frequently praised by satisfied customers.

**Common Roofing Services Offered:**
Quality roofing companies in Allentown typically provide a comprehensive range of services, including:
* **Roof Installation** For new constructions or complete replacements, offering various materials like asphalt shingles, metal, slate, tile, and flat roofing systems.
* **Roof Repair** Addressing issues such as leaks, missing shingles, and structural damage to maintain the roof's functionality and appearance.
* **Roof Inspections and Maintenance** Regular assessments to identify potential problems and extend the lifespan of the roof.
* **Commercial Roofing** Tailored solutions for businesses, including flat roofs and energy-efficient systems.
* **Emergency Repairs** Services for unexpected and urgent roofing issues.
* **Gutter Solutions** Many roofing contractors also offer gutter services.
* **Weatherproofing and Insulation Services** Some companies offer additional services like weatherproofing and insulation.

When selecting a roofing contractor, it is advisable to gather details about their experience, check their licensing and insurance, review customer testimonials, and inquire about the warranties they offer on both materials and workmanship.

| **Quality Roofing Supply Co., Inc.** | Roofing supplies & contracting | **Not BBB Accredited** (BBB Rating: Not Rated). Use caution. | (610) 820-5366 \| [BBB Profile](https://www.bbb.org/us/pa/allentown/profile/roofing-contractors/quality-roofing-supply-co-inc-0241-235984473) |

#### Key Tips for Hiring in Allentown
- **Project Timelines**: Residential: 3-7 days (minor repairs: 1-2 days); complex roofs: weeks. Check local building codes, especially historic areas.
- **Red Flags**: Avoid door-to-door after storms, vague quotes, no insurance proof, or pressure tactics (per Angi advice).
- **Next Steps**: Start with free inspections (e.g., Manchester). Verify licenses, insurance, and references.

For commercial needs, **Manchester Roofing Systems** stands out as the quality leader. Contact them or use Angi for quick matches. If you need residential focus, go with the YouTube top 5.

Here are several well-regarded roofers in Boyertown, PA, that you can consider depending on your needs:

### For Residential Roofing (Repairs & Replacements)
- **Foulds Roofing**
Family‑owned company serving Boyertown and surrounding Berks County areas. They offer roof repair, roof replacement, emergency roofing, and full exterior home services, with a focus on historic homes and rural properties.
Contact: (484) 999‑0011

- **Bachman’s Roofing**
Long‑standing local business with over 40 years serving residential and commercial properties in the Boyertown area. Good option if you want an established, quality‑focused contractor.
Website: Bachman’s Roofing, Building & Remodeling (Boyertown page)

- **Mark J. Fisher Roofing (Mark J. Fisher Roofing Co.)**
Focused on residential roofing in Boyertown (19512). Markets itself as a premier roofing company for the community, specializing in repairs and replacements.
Website: Mark J. Fisher Roofing – Boyertown PA

### For GAF‑Certified Work
- **GAF Roofing Contractors in Boyertown**
GAF maintains a list of certified residential roofing contractors in Boyertown. Choosing a GAF‑certified roofer gives you access to manufacturer warranties and installers who meet GAF’s standards.
Use the GAF contractor search for Boyertown, PA to find and request estimates from several local options.

### For Commercial Roofing (Especially Flat Roofs)
- **Manchester Roofing Systems**
Specializes in commercial flat and low‑slope roofs using Duro‑Last systems. They highlight energy‑efficient, leak‑proof commercial roofing and have installed over a million square feet around Boyertown.
Contact: 877‑220‑4590

### Additional Options to Compare
- **BBB Directory – Roofing Contractors near Boyertown, PA**
Lists multiple contractors such as:
- Philip Boyer Contracting (Boyertown)
- Stauffer Construction (roofing, siding, gutters – Bechtelsville/Boyertown area)
- Mutter Contracting (Boyertown)
- Several others in Gilbertsville, Bechtelsville, and nearby towns.

- **IKO Contractor Finder – Boyertown, PA**
Provides a curated list of IKO‑qualified contractors like “ROOFPRO” partners, which can be helpful if you prefer contractors experienced with IKO shingles.

### How to Choose
- **Get multiple estimates**—ideally 3 from different contractors.
- Check online reviews on Angi, BBB, and Google.
- Confirm that the contractor is licensed, insured, and offers written warranties.
- Ask about storm damage or insurance claim experience if that’s your situation.

If you tell me what you need (shingle roof repair, full replacement, storm damage, commercial vs. residential), I can narrow this list to one or two top recommendations tailored to your project.

Gemini Not Mentioned
When dealing with homeowners insurance claims for roof damage in Pennsylvania, it's beneficial to work with a roofer experienced in navigating the claims process. Several companies across Pennsylvania specialize in assisting homeowners with this, providing services from initial inspection and documentation to communicating with insurance adjusters and completing repairs.

Here are some recommended roofers in Pennsylvania known for handling homeowners insurance claims:

* **Superior Services of PA & MD** uniquely partners with licensed Public Adjusters, who are legally authorized to negotiate property damage claims on your behalf. They offer a comprehensive approach where their experienced roofing contractors identify damage, and the Public Adjusters work to ensure the damage is approved and covered by your insurance, often with their services included at no extra cost to the homeowner.
* **Top Peak Roofing**, serving Bucks County, PA, provides expert guidance and professional repair services for various insurance-related issues, including damage from storms, hail, wind, falling debris, fire, and water. They assist homeowners with crucial documentation, inspections, and direct communication with insurance providers.
* **Liberty Roofing Pros LLC**, with offices in Fredonia and Erie, PA, offers extensive insurance claims assistance. Their services include thorough damage assessment and documentation (with photos and detailed reports), help with accurate claim filing, providing detailed roof repair estimates, and offering expert representation during visits from insurance adjusters.
* **Ryan's Roofing LLC** specializes in roof assessments, storm damage repairs, and complete roof replacements across Pennsylvania. They guide homeowners through every step, from documenting initial damage to the final repair work for insurance claims.
* **Salco Roofing and Seamless Gutters** in Pittsburgh, PA, brings over 20 years of experience to insurance claim assistance. They employ a structured, evidence-driven process focusing on accurate damage evaluation, factual documentation, and clear communication to ensure legitimate damage is recognized and repairs are appropriately scoped in areas like Allegheny County.
* **Hero Home Solutions**, serving Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Delaware, and Maryland, offers a full-service roof claim process. This includes free property inspections, meticulous documentation of damage for adjusters, assistance with claim filing, coordination with adjusters, and flexible financing options for any costs not fully covered by insurance.
* **Roof Maxx Mechanicsburg** in Central Pennsylvania helps homeowners with insurance claims by assisting with repairs, replacements, and facilitating communication with insurance companies to ensure all damages are properly addressed.
* **Middle Creek Roofing** in Newmanstown, PA, offers comprehensive storm damage inspections and insurance claim assistance, providing a variety of premium materials for roof replacements.
* **Par One Construction** in McSherrystown, PA, is recognized for its expertise in assisting homeowners with navigating insurance claims following significant storm damage in Adams and York County.
* **Good Hands Roofing** in Central PA is highly recommended for a range of roofing services, including emergency storm damage response and insurance claim assistance.
* **Alliance Restoration** in Allentown, PA, and the Lehigh Valley, provides local contractors who offer storm damage roof inspections, expert support during inspections, assistance with adjuster communication, and high-quality roof repairs. Customer testimonials highlight their effective insurance claim process.

When selecting a roofer, it is advisable to choose a company that is licensed and insured, has a proven track record with insurance claim work, can provide detailed documentation, and effectively communicate with your insurance provider. Having your chosen contractor present during the insurance adjuster's inspection can also be beneficial to ensure all damage is accurately documented.

# Recommended Roofers for Homeowners Insurance Claims in PA

Based on the search results, here are several highly-regarded roofers in Pennsylvania that specialize in homeowners insurance claims assistance:

## Statewide/Multi-Region Services

**1. Superior Services of PA & MD**
- **Unique Feature:** Only local contractor exclusively partnered with licensed Public Adjusters
- **Advantage:** Public Adjusters are legally allowed to negotiate with insurance companies on your behalf (contractors are not)
- **Coverage:** PA & MD

**2. Greenawalt Roofing Company**
- **Experience:** Established company with multiple locations
- **Service Areas:**
- Central PA: Lancaster, Harrisburg, York, Lebanon, Reading
- Pittsburgh area: Allegheny, Westmoreland, Butler, and surrounding counties
- Philadelphia area: Philadelphia, Bucks, Montgomery, Delaware, Chester, Lehigh

## Regional Specialists

**3. Salco Roofing and Seamless Gutters** (Pittsburgh)
- 20+ years of experience
- Evidence-driven, structured approach to claims
- Focus on accuracy and protecting homeowners from under-scoped repairs

**4. Judge Brothers** (Scranton)
- 50+ years of experience
- BBB A+ rated
- Offers 0% financing for 20 months

**5. Top Peak Roofing** (Bucks County/Greater Philadelphia)
- Handles storm damage, leaks, hail, and wind-related issues
- Free inspection and consultation available

**Key Tip:** Ask any contractor if they work with a Public Adjuster—this is the most effective way to maximize your insurance claim payout.

### Top Roofing Company Recommendations in Allentown, PA

Based on the search results, here are the most prominently recommended and established roofing companies in Allentown and the Lehigh Valley area. I've prioritized those with strong local presence, family-owned status, certifications, positive mentions, and service offerings like roofing, siding, gutters, and repairs for residential/commercial needs.

#### 1. **Paul Wright Roofing** (Top Pick)
- **Website**: [paulwrightroofing.com](https://paulwrightroofing.com)
- **Why recommended**: Ranked #1 in a YouTube review of top 5 Allentown roofers. Family-owned with 35+ years of experience. Specializes in roofing, siding, and gutters. Customers praise timely responses, professionalism, and high-quality work (e.g., "top-quality work left us extremely satisfied").
- **Contact**: Not listed in results; visit site for details.
- **Best for**: Reliable, expert services treating properties with care.

#### 2. **J.O.N. Construction, Inc.**
- **Website**: [jonroofingandsiding.com](https://jonroofingandsiding.com)
- **Why recommended**: Local, family-owned Lehigh Valley roofer emphasizing free estimates, competitive pricing, and certifications. Offers roofing, siding, windows, gutters, and repairs for residential/commercial. Environmentally friendly and community-focused.
- **Contact**: 610-841-3722 (free estimates).
- **Best for**: Comprehensive exterior services with decades of repair experience.

#### Other Strong Options from Rankings and Certifications
| Company | Key Highlights | Source |
|---------|----------------|--------|
| **Allentown Roofing** | Ranked #2 in top 5; local focus. | YouTube top 5 |
| **In The Light Roofing** | Ranked #3; recommended for Allentown. | YouTube top 5 |
| **Bachmans Roofing** (or Bachmann's) | Ranked #4; solid local option. | YouTube top 5 |
| **Bruno Roofing and Siding** | Ranked #5; siding expertise. | YouTube top 5 |
| **Whitaker Roofing & Siding** | Lehigh Valley specialist; emergency services, 2-year workmanship warranty. | Dedicated site |
| **Roof Strong, Sweeney's Reliable Roofing, etc.** | Owens Corning certified independents near Allentown. | Owens Corning list |

#### Tips for Choosing
- **Verify certifications**: Check GAF ([gaf.com](https://www.gaf.com)) or Owens Corning ([owenscorning.com](https://www.owenscorning.com)) lists for quality assurance.
- **Read reviews**: Angi ([angi.com](https://www.angi.com)) has real customer ratings (e.g., recent 2025 review for Frankie Contractor).
- **Next steps**: Call for free estimates (e.g., J.O.N.). Paul Wright stands out for top rankings and testimonials.

When seeking a reliable roofing company in Berks County, several highly-rated options stand out for their quality of work, customer service, and range of services.

**Red Patch Roofing & Contracting, LLC** is a veteran-owned company known for its integrity, punctuality, and commitment to lasting workmanship. They offer free roof inspections and a 15-year labor warranty on roof replacements. Many five-star reviews from areas like Leesport, Reading, Wyomissing, and Fleetwood commend their consistent performance and clean workmanship. They utilize modern tools like drone inspections and EagleView measurements for accurate and transparent estimates.

**Bachman's Roofing** is another highly regarded company in Berks County, offering comprehensive residential and commercial roofing solutions, from small repairs to full replacements. They are known for providing some of the best warranties in the industry and a wide selection of materials. Bachman's Roofing emphasizes a detailed approach to every home and offers free quotes.

**American Remodeling** has been serving Reading and surrounding areas in Berks County since 1982, boasting decades of experience in residential roofing services. They offer various roofing materials, including metal, asphalt shingle, and Tilcor stone-coated steel roofing, and are praised for their transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

**Foulds Roofing** is a family-owned roofing contractor built on craftsmanship and integrity. They offer residential roof replacement (architectural shingles, metal, cedar, single-ply flat roofing) and repairs for leaks, storm damage, and missing shingles. They are committed to ongoing training to stay current with the latest roofing systems and installation techniques.

For those interested in Amish craftsmanship, **Lititz Roofing** and **Elmer's Roofing** are notable choices. Lititz Roofing highlights their skilled Berks County Amish craftsmen who use time-tested methods to ensure roofs are built to last, offering both metal and asphalt shingle roofs. Elmer's Roofing is a full-service residential roofing business primarily replacing old shingled roofs with new asphalt shingles and is a GAF contractor. Customers frequently praise Elmer's Roofing for their efficiency, professionalism, and meticulous cleanup.
