### Top Residential Roofing Contractors in Eastern PA

Based on the search results, here are the most relevant residential roofing contractors serving Eastern Pennsylvania (e.g., NEPA areas like Lackawanna, Luzerne, Wayne, Pike, Wyoming, Monroe, Susquehanna counties; Lehigh Valley; Easton/Allentown/Bethlehem; Stroudsburg). I've prioritized those explicitly mentioning residential services, roof repairs/replacements, and local coverage. Commercial-focused ones are noted but deprioritized.

#### 1. **Eastern Residential Solutions** (Top Match for NEPA Residential)
- **Website**: [easternresidentialsolutions.com](https://www.easternresidentialsolutions.com)
- **Services**: Full-service residential contractor specializing in roof repair/replacement, siding, seamless gutters. Handles new construction and existing homes.
- **Coverage**: NEPA (Lackawanna, Luzerne, Wayne, Pike, Wyoming, Monroe, Susquehanna counties).
- **Why relevant**: Direct focus on residential exteriors; no commercial emphasis.

#### 2. **East Penn Roofing** (Lehigh Valley Specialist)
- **Website**: [eastpennroofing.com](https://www.eastpennroofing.com)
- **Services**: Roof replacements, repairs, seamless gutters for residential and commercial. Separate crews for residential properties; licensed/insured in PA.
- **Coverage**: Lehigh Valley, PA and surrounding areas.
- **Why relevant**: Emphasizes residential with trained specialists; elite craftsmanship on all roof types/materials.

#### 3. **Todd Miller Roofing** (Easton Area)
- **Website**: [toddmillerroofing.com](https://toddmillerroofing.com)
- **Services**: Residential/commercial roof repairs/replacements (asphalt shingles, synthetic cedar shake), siding, seamless gutters. 25+ years experience; insured.
- **Coverage**: Eastern PA (Easton, Allentown, Bethlehem).
- **Why relevant**: Family-owned, local focus on residential replacements; hail/wind damage experts.

#### 4. **PA Home Roofing & Construction** (Pocono/Northeast PA)
- **Website**: [pahomeroof.com](https://pahomeroof.com)
- **Services**: Shingle roofing, emergency repairs for residential.
- **Coverage**: Stroudsburg, PA (Monroe County area).
- **Why relevant**: Offers free estimates; targeted at residential in eastern PA.

#### Other Options
- **Eastern Roofing Systems** ([easternroofingsystems.com](https://www.easternroofingsystems.com)): Primarily commercial/industrial (150M+ sq ft installed), but mentions residential steep-slope and standing seam metal roofing. HQ in Jessup, PA; serves Northeast/Mid-Atlantic.
- **GAF-Certified Contractors** ([gaf.com](https://www.gaf.com/en-us/roofing-contractors/residential/usa/pa)): Search by zip for top-rated PA roofers with strong warranties. Free quotes common.
- **North East, PA Locals** (via Angi [angi.com](https://www.angi.com/companylist/us/pa/north-east/roofing.htm)): Smaller firms like Liberty Roofing Pros, C&C Construction, Troyer's Construction (4.3 avg rating; reviews up to 2025). Best for Erie County/Northwest PA edge.

**Recommendations**: Start with Eastern Residential Solutions for broad NEPA coverage or East Penn for Lehigh Valley. Most offer free estimates. Verify licensing/insurance and check recent reviews, as data is current to late 2025. For GAF certification, use their tool for vetted pros near your zip.

Gemini Not Mentioned
For residents and businesses in Allentown, PA, several companies offer professional roof inspection services to assess the condition of roofs and identify potential issues. These services are crucial for preventative maintenance, addressing storm damage, and preparing for roof repairs or replacements.

Common aspects inspected by Allentown roofing professionals include damaged or missing shingles, signs of water intrusion, mold or mildew, flashing issues, and any structural concerns that could lead to leaks or costly repairs. Regular inspections are particularly important due to the year-round change of seasons in Allentown, which can be damaging to roofs, with winter snow and ice posing a significant risk for problems. Commercial roofs, in particular, should be inspected at least once a year due to their lower slope, which can trap moisture and debris.

Several companies in the Allentown area provide these services:

* **Bachman's Roofing** offers professional roofers to investigate and assess damage, often at no cost. They have over 50 years of experience serving both residential and commercial clients.
* **Alliance Restorations** provides roofing inspection services with a focus on using top-quality roofing hardware and experienced inspectors. They also offer no-cost pricing quotes.
* **The Exterior Company** offers free roofing inspections and holds an A+ BBB rating. They are experienced and certified roofing professionals providing comprehensive residential and commercial exterior services.
* **The Allentown Roofers** are a family-owned and operated company with 20 years of experience, performing roof inspections, repairs, replacements, and installations for various roofing materials. They offer free inspections before starting any roofing job.

Many of these companies emphasize their commitment to quality work, customer service, and providing accurate estimates. When choosing a roof inspection service, it's beneficial to look for experienced and certified professionals who offer free inspections and comprehensive warranties.

- **What they check**: Shingles, flashing, leaks, water damage, mold, ventilation, storm wear (common in PA seasons).

- **Phone**: (610) 754-1202
- **Website**: [rrs-inc.com/reading-roofing](https://rrs-inc.com/reading-roofing/)
- **Why recommended**: Licensed/insured; financing available.

#### 5. **Lancaster Roofing Company, LLC**
- **Services**: Free roof inspections (residential/commercial); repairs, replacements, maintenance; emergency services.
- **Phone**: (717) 356-9810
- **Website**: [lancasterroofingcompany.com/roofers-reading-pa](https://lancasterroofingcompany.com/roofers-reading-pa/)
- **Why recommended**: Certified, bonded, insured; honest evaluations; Amish-owned with strong Reading presence.

#### Other Options
| Company | Key Inspection Notes | Contact |
|---------|----------------------|---------|
| **McDowell Roofing** | Routine maintenance/inspections implied in full services | (484) 403-5112; [mcdowellroofingllc.com](https://www.mcdowellroofingllc.com) |
| **Zimmerman's Roofing** | Inspections as part of repairs/maintenance/cleaning | [zimmermansroofing.com/service-area/reading-pa](https://zimmermansroofing.com/service-area/reading-pa/) |
| **Directories** | Angi/HomeAdvisor for top-rated local roofers (e.g., Harris Roofing) with reviews | [Angi](https://www.angi.com/companylist/us/pa/reading/roofing.htm), [HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/c.Roofing.Reading.PA.-12061.html) |

**Tips**:
- Schedule soon for spring maintenance (post-winter damage common in PA).
- Ask for HAAG certification for insurance claims.
- Most provide free initial inspections—compare quotes from 2-3.

For the latest reviews or more options, check Angi or HomeAdvisor. If you need help narrowing by price or urgency, provide more details!

* **Lehigh Gap Exteriors** is a family-owned company that has been helping Eastern Pennsylvania homeowners with exterior remodeling, including siding, since 2005. They serve Lehigh, Northampton, Monroe, and Carbon counties.
* **J.O.N. Construction, Inc.** provides siding services and free estimates for the Lehigh Valley and surrounding areas, emphasizing siding as a crucial part of a home's protective barrier.

- **Verify Reviews**: Use Angi/HomeAdvisor for 900+ local reviews; cross-check Google/Yelp.

For the latest, search current reviews or contact directly—rankings can shift with new feedback.

- **Services**: Repairs, replacements, installations for residential/commercial. Over 40 years experience; best warranties in industry.
- **Why top-rated?** Long-established local expert with Boyertown focus.

3. **Mark J. Fisher Roofing**
- **Website**: [fisherroofing.biz/boyertown-pa-roofing-company](https://fisherroofing.biz/boyertown-pa-roofing-company-boyertown-pennsylvania-roofing-company-boyertown-pa-roofing-company-boyertown-pa-19512-roofing-company-boyertown-pa-roofing-company-19512/)
- **Services**: Residential roof repairs, replacements; premier Boyertown specialist (ZIP 19512).
- **Why top-rated?** Positions itself as the top Boyertown roofer.

4. **Philip Boyer Contracting**
- **Phone**: (610) 473-3167
- **Address**: 89 Sunset Dr, Boyertown, PA 19512
- **Services**: General contracting, roofing, home improvement (BBB-listed).
- **Why top-rated?** Local Boyertown address; established in BBB directory.

5. **Mutter Contracting**
- **Phone**: (610) 367-4495
- **Address**: 493 Landis Store Rd, Boyertown, PA 19512
- **Services**: General contracting, roofing (BBB-listed).
- **Why top-rated?** Right in Boyertown; reliable local option.

#### Other Notable Mentions (Nearby/Regional):
- **Manchester Roofing Systems**: Commercial flat roofs (Duro-Last certified). [Website](https://www.manchesterroofingsystems.com/services/roofing-contractor-boyertown-pa/)
- **WHT Roofing, Inc. / Rapid Response Roofing & Repairs LLC / Carranza Roofing**: Gilbertsville area (nearby), via BBB.
- **GAF-Certified Roofers**: Multiple options—search [GAF's Boyertown list](https://www.gaf.com/en-us/roofing-contractors/residential/usa/pa/boyertown) for warranted pros.
- Aggregators for Reviews/Quotes: [Angi](https://www.angi.com/companylist/us/pa/boyertown/roofing.htm), [BuildZoom](https://www.buildzoom.com/boyertown-pa/roofers) (8 roofers with photos/reviews/permits), [BBB](https://www.bbb.org/us/pa/boyertown/category/roofing-contractors).

#### Tips for Your Metal Roof Project (A.B. Martin Panels):
- **Verify A.B. Martin Experience**: Contact 2-3 from the list above and ask about metal roof installs, specifically A.B. Martin (common in PA for durable standing seam panels). They may partner with local suppliers.
- **Next Steps**: Request free estimates (most offer them). Check reviews on Angi/BBB/BuildZoom, licenses/insurance, and warranties. For metal roofs, ensure they handle proper underlayment/ventilation for longevity.
- **Local Edge**: Stick to Boyertown-based like Foulds, Bachman's, or Boyer for quick response and familiarity with Berks County codes/weather.

If you provide more details (e.g., roof size, budget), I can refine recommendations or suggest follow-up searches!

Eastern Pennsylvania is home to several top-rated roofing companies known for their quality work, customer service, and certifications. When searching for a roofer, look for companies with strong online reviews and industry recognition.

Here are some of the highly-regarded roofing contractors in Eastern PA:

* **East Penn Roofing** is a 5-star customer-rated contractor in the Lehigh Valley, specializing in residential and commercial roof replacements and repairs. They are licensed and insured in Pennsylvania and offer workmanship and manufacturer warranties. With over 25 years of experience, they are a locally and family-owned business.
* **Excelsior Roofing** is recognized as one of the best roofing companies in Pennsylvania, with over 100 5-star reviews on Angie's List, Facebook, and Google. They serve areas including Easton, Bethlehem, and Quakertown. Excelsior Roofing provides comprehensive "on-roof" inspections and estimates.
* **GAF Certified Contractors**: GAF, North America's largest roofing manufacturer, certifies contractors who can then offer their strongest warranties. Their certifications include GAF Certified™, GAF Certified Plus™, and the prestigious GAF Master Elite® and President's Club Award, which signify the highest level of recognition among Master Elite® contractors. You can find GAF-certified roofers across Pennsylvania through their website.
* **Lehigh Valley Roofers** in Emmaus, PA, has over 15 years of experience and holds a 5.0 overall rating on HomeAdvisor based on reviews. They offer services for asphalt shingle roofing, flat, foam, or single-ply roofing, and roof sealant applications.
* **Bonner Master Roofing**, headquartered in Media, Pennsylvania, serves the Philadelphia area and other counties in PA, offering full-service roofing for conventional, copper, and polymer materials.
* **Umbrella Roofing – Greater Philadelphia Roofer** has founders with over 30,000 roofs completed and provides roof installation, siding, gutter installation, maintenance, and emergency repairs in the greater Philadelphia area. They hold a 4.8 Forbes Home Improvement rating and a 5.0 customer rating.
* **Bell Roofing Company, LLC** has over 30 years of experience in the Philadelphia area, offering free estimates for shingle, flat, and rubber/EPDM roofing, as well as emergency repairs.
* **Warner Exteriors & Solar** serves Philadelphia and southern New Jersey, providing roof replacements, repairs, and commercial, metal, and asphalt roofing services.

Other highly-rated companies in the Lehigh Valley area mentioned in local listings include EURO CONSTRUCTION GROUP LLC, Vera Construction LLC, and Quality One Roofing Inc., all with average ratings of 5 out of 5 stars. * **Seifert Contracting, LLC** has been in business for 30 years and is considered one of the most trusted roofing companies in Easton, known for being dependable, professional, and affordable.

When choosing a roofing contractor, it's advisable to consider companies with consistently positive feedback on review sites, request detailed written estimates, and inquire about warranties and guarantees.

Many roofing contractors in Eastern Pennsylvania specialize in handling insurance claims for roof damage. These companies typically assist homeowners throughout the entire claims process, from initial damage assessment to final repairs or replacement.

Some of the contractors in Eastern PA that handle insurance claim roofing include:

* **Top Peak Roofing** serves Bucks County, PA, and offers assistance with various insurance-related roofing issues like storm, hail, wind, and falling debris damage, as well as roof leaks, fire/water damage, and emergency tarping. They provide professional assessments, damage documentation, direct communication with adjusters, and advocacy for their clients.
* **Liberty Roofing Pros LLC** provides comprehensive insurance claims assistance across Pennsylvania. Their services include assessing and documenting damage with photos and detailed reports, assisting with claim filing, providing detailed repair estimates, and offering expert representation during adjuster visits.
* **United Veterans Roofing** handles roof insurance claims in Pennsylvania and New Jersey. They aim to streamline the process for customers by providing clear communication with agents, thorough damage reports, and post-repair reports. They also offer emergency roof tarping, roof replacements, and roof restorations covered by insurance.
* **RAM Exteriors** in Doylestown, PA, acts as a roof insurance claim contractor, helping with storm damage, hail damage, and wind damage repairs. They conduct detailed inspections, photographic documentation, and communicate with adjusters to ensure claims meet professional standards.
* **Pocono Prime Builders, LLC** assists homeowners in Milford, PA, and the surrounding Pocono region with roof insurance claims. Their team helps navigate the process, including understanding the importance of contacting the insurance company promptly and providing proof of storm damage to adjusters.
* **Neill & Son Roofing**, although primarily based out of Pittsburgh (Western PA), emphasizes their expertise in handling roofing insurance claims throughout Pennsylvania, offering guidance and support for storm and hail damage.
* **Superior Services of PA & MD** positions itself as a roofing insurance expert by partnering with licensed public adjusters, who are legally allowed to negotiate with insurance companies on behalf of the insured in Pennsylvania. As contractors, they identify damage, and their partnered adjusters work to get the damage approved and paid for.
* **Roof Maxx Mechanicsburg** serves Central Pennsylvania and helps homeowners with roof repairs, replacements, and guidance through the insurance claim process, particularly for damage caused by unpredictable weather like heavy snowfalls, ice storms, and thunderstorms.

These companies typically offer services such as detailed inspections, documentation of damage, assistance with filing claims, communication with insurance adjusters, and performing the necessary repairs or replacements once the claim is approved.
Perplexity Not Mentioned
### Who Handles Roofing Insurance Claims in Eastern PA?

In Eastern Pennsylvania (e.g., areas like Bucks County, Greater Philadelphia, Lehigh Valley, Poconos), **homeowners (the insured) legally handle and negotiate their own roofing insurance claims**. Roofing contractors **cannot legally negotiate claims** on your behalf—only you or a **licensed Public Adjuster** can do that, per state regulations highlighted in the search results.

#### Key Players and Services
| Role | Who They Are | What They Do | Examples from Eastern PA |
|------|--------------|--------------|--------------------------|
| **You (Homeowner/Insured)** | Policyholder | File the claim, provide proof of loss (detailed damage inventory within 30-60 days), communicate with insurer. PA law requires insurers to acknowledge claims in 10 days, investigate in 30 days, and decide in 15 days after proof of loss. | N/A |
| **Licensed Public Adjuster** | State-licensed professional (only party besides you allowed to negotiate) | Negotiate with insurer for maximum payout; exclusively partnered with some contractors. | **Superior Services of PA & MD** (only local contractor partnered with them; handles representation in PA/MD). |
| **Roofing Contractors** | Local roofers (cannot negotiate but assist) | Free inspections, damage reports, photos/videos, coordination with adjusters, estimates, advocacy via documentation, and repairs post-approval. They guide the process but defer negotiation to you or adjuster. | - **Top Peak Roofing** (Bucks County/Philadelphia; coordinates adjusters, speeds approvals).<br>- **Greenawalt Roofing** (inspections before filing to avoid rate hikes).<br>- **ATLAS Construction** (DE/PA; documentation, assessments for storm claims).<br>- **Pocono Prime Builders** (Poconos; full process guidance).<br>- **Alliance Restoration** (Allentown/Lehigh Valley; inspections/repairs).<br>- **Umbrella Roof** (Philadelphia; free inspections/advocacy).<br>- Others like RoofMaxx Mechanicsburg, Lifetime Quality Roofing. |
| **Insurance Company Adjuster** | Insurer's rep | Inspects damage, approves/denies claim based on policy (e.g., named peril vs. all-risk). | Sent by your insurer after you file. |

#### Recommended Steps (From Multiple Sources)
1. **Assess Damage**: Visual check; take photos/videos.
2. **Review Policy**: Check deductibles, timelines (file ASAP; proof of loss in 60 days max).
3. **Get Free Inspection**: Call a local roofer **before filing** (e.g., Greenawalt advises this to check if under deductible).
4. **File Claim**: Contact insurer with details.
5. **Independent Roofer Estimate**: Use for full scope (e.g., RoofMaxx).
6. **Negotiate if Needed**: Hire Public Adjuster (Superior Services) for denials/bad faith (PA allows punitive damages, fees).
7. **Repairs & Close**: Contractor fixes; submit invoices.

**Pro Tip**: Avoid filing small claims to prevent rate increases. For storms/hail/wind, document thoroughly. Contact PA Dept. of Insurance for disputes. Start with a free inspection from Top Peak, Superior Services, or ATLAS for Eastern PA coverage.

When seeking a reputable commercial roofer in Eastern Pennsylvania, several companies stand out based on their experience, customer feedback, and industry certifications. Here are some highly-regarded options:

**Manchester Commercial Roofing Systems**
Manchester Commercial Roofing Systems is recognized for its high-performance, leak-proof, and sustainable cool roofing systems for flat and low-slope roofs. They are a certified Duro-Last Master Contractor and hold a BBB accreditation. Customers frequently praise their professionalism, excellent communication, timely project completion, and the robust 20-year warranty offered on their Duro-Last products. They serve Pennsylvania, Delaware, and New Jersey.

**East Penn Roofing**
Serving the Lehigh Valley and surrounding counties like Bucks, Berks, and Montgomery, East Penn Roofing is a 5-star customer-rated contractor for both residential and commercial roofing. They are licensed and insured in Pennsylvania and provide workmanship warranties in writing, along with thorough manufacturer warranties from leading suppliers like GAF. East Penn Roofing holds multiple certifications, including Owens Corning Preferred Contractor, CertainTeed Shingle Select Contractor, and GAF Certified Installer. Customers commend their detailed explanations, competitive pricing, and exceptional cleanup. The company is also BBB accredited.

**Green Rhino Builders**
Operating in Northeastern PA, including Wilkes-Barre, Hazelton, Kingston, and Dallas, Green Rhino Builders has a strong overall rating of 4.9 out of 5 on HomeAdvisor. They specialize in commercial roof replacements, repairs, and energy-efficient upgrades, working with various systems like TPO, PVC, EPDM, and metal roofs. Reviews highlight their professional, prompt, and efficient service, and their commitment to customer satisfaction. Green Rhino Builders is also a GAF Master Elite Contractor.

**GSM Roofing**
With nearly 80 years of experience, GSM Roofing serves Eastern PA, NJ, DE, and MD, specializing in commercial and specialty roofing projects, including slate, tile, and metal roofs. They offer a wide range of services, including new construction, roof replacement, maintenance, and 24/7 emergency repairs. Customer testimonials on their website and GAF profile commend their quality craftsmanship and professional approach. However, it's worth noting that employee reviews on platforms like SimplyHired and Indeed present a mixed perspective, with some praising company culture and work-life balance, while others express concerns about management and policies.

**Eastern Roofing Systems**
Headquartered in Jessup, PA, Eastern Roofing Systems handles complex commercial and industrial roofing across the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic regions. They hold an A+ rating and accreditation with the Better Business Bureau (BBB). Feedback from GuildQuality surveys indicates a 4.8 rating, with a high percentage of customers recommending their services. Customers have noted their promptness, cleanliness, and quality workmanship, with some also appreciating their assistance with insurance claims. However, one review on the BBB website contained a negative comment regarding a salesperson.

**Roofing by Bruce**
Serving Allentown and Stroudsburg, Roofing by Bruce has been in the industry since 1985 and is BBB accredited. They offer various commercial roofing options, including Built-Up Roofs (BUR), Spray Foam, Modified Bitumen, EPDM, TPO, and PVC roofing systems. Their website features positive customer reviews praising their quality work, professionalism, and thorough cleanup.

When choosing a commercial roofer, it is recommended to consider their specific experience with your type of roofing system, inquire about their safety protocols, request references, and obtain detailed quotes.

### Top Roofing Contractor Recommendations for Berks County, PA

Based on the provided search results, here are the strongest options for replacing your roof in Berks County. I prioritized companies with **local focus**, **longevity/experience**, **certifications/awards**, **family-owned status** (indicating reliability), **contact details**, and **specific strengths** like warranties or specialties. All serve Berks County (e.g., Reading, Mohnton, Wyomissing) and offer residential roofing replacements. Avoided mismatches like out-of-state service areas.

#### Quick Comparison Table
| Company | Key Strengths | Experience | Certifications/Awards | Phone | Website |
|---------|---------------|------------|-----------------------|-------|---------|
| **Greenawalt Roofing** (Top Pick) | 20+ years, 16,000+ projects; roofing, siding, gutters; storm damage experts | Family-owned, CertainTeed-certified, Governor’s Award winner | CertainTeed Master Shingle Applicator | Not listed (use site form) | [greenawaltroofing.com](https://greenawaltroofing.com/location/berks-pa/) |
| **Scott Macczak Roofing** | 51+ years; residential & commercial; Versico certified for rubber roofs | Cornerstone of Berks since 1974 | Versico Rubber Roofing Certified | (610) 400-8208 | [scottmacczakroofing.com](https://www.scottmacczakroofing.com) |
| **Foulds Roofing** | Family-owned; roofing, siding, gutters, windows, doors; free estimates | Berks-focused craftsmanship | None specified | (484) 999-0011 | [fouldsroofing.com](https://fouldsroofing.com) |
| **Red Patch Roofing** | Veteran-owned; free inspections, 15-year labor warranty; pressure washing/gutters | Licensed (PA HIC # PA200867) | Top-rated by homeowners | (610) 587-2709 | [redpatchroofing.com](https://www.redpatchroofing.com) |
| **White & Sons Roofing** | 30+ years (since 1994), 3 generations; 24/7 emergency; residential/commercial | OSHA-trained crew, lifetime warranties implied | None specified | Not listed (use site) | [whitesroofingandsonsinc.com](https://www.whitesroofingandsonsinc.com) |

#### Why These Stand Out (Evidence from Results)
- **Greenawalt Roofing**: Explicitly called "premier Berks County roofing company" with massive project volume (16,000+), CertainTeed certification, and award. Ideal for comprehensive replacements—handles full exteriors with "unmatched quality."
- **Scott Macczak Roofing**: Longest track record (51 years), "Berks County's Premier" status. Strong for durability; certified for commercial-grade materials, which translates to residential reliability.
- **Others**: Foulds emphasizes "honest service" as non-sales family operation. Red Patch highlights warranties and trust (veteran-owned proof). White & Sons offers multi-generational expertise and emergencies.

BBB lists (e.g., Baum's, Straub) lack details here, so I deprioritized them. Lititz (Amish/metal focus) and American Remodeling are solid but narrower.

#### My Recommendation: Start with **Greenawalt Roofing**
- **Hire them if**: You want proven scale, certifications, and full-service (roof + exteriors). Their awards and project count reduce risk of shoddy work.
- Get **3+ free quotes** (most offer them). Ask for references, insurance proof, and material options (e.g., asphalt shingles).
- **Next Steps**: Call/text top 2-3 today. Check recent Google/Yelp reviews (not in results) and PA Attorney General complaints for latest 2026 updates. Verify licenses via PA Attorney General site.

This ensures a durable roof—Berks weather demands it. If you share budget/home size/details, I can refine.

**Bachman's Roofing, Building & Remodeling**

- **Services:** Residential and commercial roof repairs, replacements, and installations
- Known for quality and longevity in the area

**MKS Construction LLC**
- **Experience:** 20+ years in roofing
- Serves all of Wyomissing, PA

- **Location:** Temple, PA (serves Wyomissing area)
- **Guarantee:** 10-year craftsmanship guarantee on new installations
- **Services:** Free quotes and 24-hour emergency roofing services

- Serves Reading and Berks County
- Offers free estimates for shingle roof services

## How to Choose:

Since "best" depends on your specific needs, I'd recommend:
1. **Check ratings** on Angi or the BBB (Better Business Bureau) for customer reviews
2. **Get multiple free estimates** from 2-3 contractors
3. **Verify licensing and insurance**
4. **Ask about warranties** on their work

Here are some highly-regarded roofing contractors in Eastern Pennsylvania:

**Serving the Lehigh Valley and surrounding areas:**

* **East Penn Roofing** is a 5-star customer-rated contractor offering comprehensive roofing services for both residential and commercial properties in the Lehigh Valley and surrounding areas. They are known for roof replacements, repairs, and seamless gutter installations, providing written workmanship warranties and utilizing industry-leading suppliers.
* **Clarke Roofing & Siding** is another highly-rated company based in the Lehigh Valley, serving Eastern Pennsylvania and Northern New Jersey. They specialize in the installation of diverse new roofing systems, affordable repairs, and maintenance for residential and commercial clients, boasting over a century of collective experience within their team. Clarke Roofing & Siding also holds a GAF-certification and offers competitive financing options.

**Serving the Greater Philadelphia Area and surrounding counties (e.g., Lancaster, Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, Berks):**

* **Excelsior Roofing** is recognized as one of the best roofing companies in Pennsylvania, with over 100 5-star reviews on platforms like Angie's List, Facebook, and Google Reviews. They have been installing high-quality roofs for over 10 years and are praised for their responsiveness, professionalism, and thorough on-roof inspections.
* **East Coast Roofing Systems**, with locations in Collegeville and Emmaus, offers roofing, window, siding, gutter, and skylight replacement services. They emphasize customer service, quality workmanship, and offer free estimates.
* **McHugh Roofing Siding General Contracting** provides various roofing services for residential and commercial properties throughout the Philadelphia area, including gutter cleaning, downspout installations, emergency roof repairs, and skylight installations.
* **Isaac's Home Improvements, LLC** specializes in roofing, siding, and custom remodeling projects across Delaware County and the broader Philadelphia area.
* **Armour Seal Roofing & Contracting** serves residential and commercial clients in Delaware County with services ranging from roof maintenance and gutter cleaning to solar panel roofing integrations and repairs.

**Other notable contractors in Eastern PA:**

* **Eastern Roofing Systems**, headquartered in Jessup, PA, started as a small-town contractor in Northeast Pennsylvania in 2001 and has grown into a large commercial roofing company, having installed over 150,000,000 sq ft of roofing. They are commercial and industrial specialists with national recognition for quality and innovation.
* Several **Amish roofing contractors** operate in Eastern Pennsylvania, particularly in the Lancaster County area, and extend their services to the greater Philadelphia region, Reading, and Allentown. Companies like PA Dutch Builders and Chief Osceola Builders offer custom roofing, siding, and general contractor work, often providing quick project completion.

When choosing a roofing contractor, it's always recommended to:
* Obtain multiple estimates.
* Check their licensing and insurance.
* Read recent customer reviews.
* Inquire about warranties on both materials and workmanship.
